title: SmartWatch X — Lifestyle Creators
description: Seeking authentic lifestyle creators to showcase the SmartWatch X in their daily routines.
requirements: Create 2 Instagram posts and 1 YouTube review. Show the watch in real-life use cases — fitness, productivity, sleep tracking.

title: TechCorp App — UGC Campaign
description: Looking for creators to produce UGC content showing our productivity app in action.
requirements: 1 TikTok video (60–90 seconds) showing 3 key features. Must be authentic, no scripted reads.

title: FreshBrand Wellness Kit Launch
description: Gifted collaboration for our new wellness starter kit. We're looking for creators in the health & wellness space.
requirements: Unboxing + 2-week trial review. Post 3 Instagram stories and 1 feed post with honest review.

title: Nutrition Blog Series — Finance Creators
description: Unusual crossover: we want personal finance creators to talk about investing in your health.
requirements: 1 long-form blog post or YouTube video connecting financial wellness with physical wellness.

title: Fruity Summer Glow Campaign
description: Showcase our Vitamin C Glow Moisturizer! We want a fun, quirky, and colorful reel and one aesthetic post. Highlight the fruit-infused textures and instant glowing skin!
requirements: 1 Instagram Reel (funky, upbeat transition video) and 1 high-quality static aesthetic Grid Post.
